name: Ludwig van Beethoven
biography: German composer and pianist. A crucial figure in the transition between the Classical and Romantic eras, Beethoven's body of music is among the most performed of any composer's.

name: Arvo Pärt
biography: Estonian composer of classical and sacred music. Since the late 1970s, Pärt has worked in a minimalist style that uses his self-invented compositional technique, tintinnabuli.

name: Federico Mompou
biography: Catalan composer and pianist whose intimate piano miniatures inhabit a quiet, harmonically static idiom often compared with Satie. Best known for the four-volume Música Callada — every track of his in the library is a fragment or excerpt that MusicBrainz never linked to a Work.
